## Summary

- What changed
- Why it changed

## Validation

- Commands run
- Manual checks

## Public-Safety Review

- [ ] I reviewed the changed lines for unintended PII or doxxing risk.
- [ ] I checked for secrets, keys, tokens, passwords, or private credentials.
- [ ] I checked for email addresses, phone numbers, or machine-local absolute paths.
- [ ] I verified that any fixed local path is intentional and documented as a public convention.
- [ ] I will leave a PR comment summarizing validation and the public-safety review.

## Risks

- Residual risks or follow-up cleanup
